chunks.text: November IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar November IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, November 11th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Li

, November 11th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, November 12th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable unt

er 12th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS

will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and themis may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Thursday, November 13th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about

l DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30am (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). Linux login servers login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will also be patched and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2025-11-13 | larsro

oted around this time. UPDATE [2025-11-13 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2025-11-13 11am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berke
tus Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
